title: Outcome feedback: event type + validator blind-spot metric
description: Source-mining audit item #2 (Extension-Plan #2, spec artifacts/planning/map-outcome-feedback-spec.md, self-declared design-only): implement the outcome event type (outcome_pass/outcome_fail per released task) and the validator blind-spot metric in map_metrics.py per the existing spec. The spec is the design authority; deviations documented in the task report.
acceptance_criteria: Outcome events are recordable per the spec and validate cleanly under validate_events --fail-on-new.
map_metrics.py reports a blind-spot rate (defects found post-release that gates missed) from outcome events.
Focused tests wired into run_tests.sh; suite stays green.
